title: leontopodium ochroleucum subsp. campestre
intro: Leontopodium ochroleucum subsp. campestre, also known as Edelweiß, is a flowering plant of the sunflower family, native to the high mountains of the European Alps. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to protect against infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Leontopodium ochroleucum subsp. campestre include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant properties. It is used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further research and validation.
